payload.short_description: dark wooden dresser corner with knob
payload.long_description: Close-up view of a dark reddish-brown wooden dresser front showing one drawer with a round brass knob, molded trim and a glossy but worn top surface; left side and top are partially edge-cropped with visible surface scratches and small chips — estimated ~0.6 m from camera.
